Locational Marginal Price (in $/MWh) for a specific price node in the Real Time market.
LMP = Energy + Congestion + Loss
Forecasted Current Operating Plan Wind Generation, reported in MWs for tomorrow
Forecasted Short-Term Wind Power Generation, reported in MWs

System Lambda - Now: The Shadow Price for the power balanced constraint, or the cost of providing one MWh of energy at a Bus. The System Lambda is the energy component of LMP at each Settlement Point in ERCOT. Reported in $/MWh.

Resource Outage Capacity - Total:  The total forward looking resource capacity offline. This comes from the ERCOT Hourly Resource Outage Capacity report, which includes all approved and accepted planned, forced and maintenance resource outages except resource outages for retirement of old equipment, seasonal mothballed (during the outaged season), and mothballed.
